# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Overview

This document provides general instructions for GitHub Copilot usage within the sanjel-drb-blazor project workspace.

## Project-Specific Guidelines

### Skills Development
When working on GitHub Skills development for this project, please refer to the comprehensive [Skills Development Guidelines](./skills-development-guidelines.md) document which contains:

- TypeScript script requirements and constraints
- Functional programming standards
- Error handling patterns
- Code organization principles
- Testing and validation guidelines
- Integration and composition patterns

## General Copilot Usage

### Code Quality
- Follow established project patterns and conventions
- Maintain consistency with existing codebase structure
- Ensure proper error handling and validation
- Write clear, self-documenting code with appropriate comments

### Documentation
- Update relevant documentation when making changes
- Follow markdown formatting standards
- Include examples where helpful
- Maintain traceability between requirements and implementation
- All saved documents must use English language

### Project Structure
- Respect the established folder hierarchy
- Place files in appropriate directories
- Follow naming conventions consistently
- Maintain separation between different project components
